TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Natawran ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,761 buwan, 4,923 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 1,491 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 3,432 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 27%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Paywan 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Natawran hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Natawran hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Natawran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Natawran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Natawran hya' ga Buner. tay mkyahu' na Natawran hya' ga Isawalian pahikukian. tay 'llaw na Natawran hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ natawran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *.*%, pajwan *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. taj mkjaħuʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕawalian paħikukian. taj ʔllaw na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Natawran ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,761 buwan, 4,923 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 1,491 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 3,432 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 27%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Paywan 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Natawran hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Natawran hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Natawran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Natawran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Natawran hya' ga Buner. tay mkyahu' na Natawran hya' ga Isawalian pahikukian. tay 'llaw na Natawran hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ natawran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *.*%, pajwan *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. taj mkjaħuʔ na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕawalian paħikukian. taj ʔllaw na natawran ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
